title: Definition of State
content: Defines the term State for the purpose of Fundamental Rights.

title: Laws inconsistent with Fundamental Rights
content: Declares that laws inconsistent with Fundamental Rights are void.

title: Equality before law
content: The State shall not deny equality before law or equal protection of laws.

title: Prohibition of discrimination
content: Prohibits discrimination on religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth.

title: Equality of opportunity
content: Ensures equal opportunity in public employment.

title: Abolition of Untouchability
content: Abolishes untouchability and forbids its practice.

title: Abolition of titles
content: Prohibits the State from conferring titles except military or academic distinctions.

title: Protection of certain rights
content: Guarantees freedoms such as speech, expression, assembly, movement.

title: Protection in respect of conviction
content: Protects against retrospective punishment and double jeopardy.

title: Protection of life and personal liberty
content: No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty except by law.

title: Right to education
content: Provides free and compulsory education to children.

title: Protection against arrest
content: Provides safeguards against arbitrary arrest and detention.

title: Prohibition of child labour
content: Prohibits employment of children in hazardous jobs.

title: Freedom from religious taxes
content: No tax for promotion of religion.

title: Freedom in education
content: No forced religious instruction in institutions.
